title: gutierrezia grandis
intro: Gutierrezia grandis, also known as Resin Bush, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its yellow or white clusters of small flowers and its distinctive, resinous leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gutierrezia grandis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
